personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of enterprise experience, specializing in designing scalable data platforms and ETL/ELT pipelines for AI and analytics solutions. Proficient in Python, SQL, and cloud platforms like AWS, I excel in data modeling, pipeline orchestration with Airflow, and implementing data governance frameworks. My expertise includes building serverless architectures and optimizing data quality for Agentic AI frameworks. I have a proven track record in distributed systems and real-time data processing. Passionate about innovation, I am eager to contribute to Kyndryl’s mission of managing mission-critical technology systems through cutting-edge data engineering and AI-driven solutions.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python and Pandas to ingest telemetry data from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with scalable solutions.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas for historical data retention, enabling advanced seasonal risk forecasting.
Developed machine learning forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead, enhancing provisioning accuracy.
Built unified reporting systems by integrating disparate data feeds into Oracle, creating executive-level dashboards.
Implemented data quality and validation processes using Pandas to ensure reliability of capacity metrics.
Identified underutilized infrastructure through data mining, driving significant cost savings via hardware consolidation.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics for critical systems, ensuring performance monitoring for Brand.com.
Led 'FAST' project to data-mine real-user performance metrics, providing actionable optimization recommendations.
Upgraded Dynatrace from version 6.5 to 7.0, implemented TLS1.2 security, and supported AWS cloud migration.
Designed dashboards for end-to-end functionality and performance metrics analysis.
Analyzed system bottlenecks and proposed performance improvements for critical applications.
Integrated Performance Center with Dynatrace for comprehensive monitoring solutions.

experience.title: APM Consultant
bullets: Supported enterprise CA APM, CEM, and ADA for utility systems, ensuring robust monitoring.
Managed and maintained monitoring solutions to optimize performance across critical infrastructure.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Led large-scale CA APM implementations and upgrades (9.1 to 10.1), managing 4,000–6,000 agents across environments.
Designed custom Management Modules, dashboards, alerts, and Perl/Ksh scripts for data extraction.
Provided sizing recommendations, created Golden Images, and trained clients on APM solutions.
Collaborated with IT teams to troubleshoot and resolve performance bottlenecks in J2EE/.NET environments.
Optimized agent and enterprise manager installations for scalability and efficiency.
Documented implementations and supported client organizations with technical expertise.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications to identify load and break points, focusing on performance optimization.
Documented critical metrics including JDBC connections, threads, memory, CPU, and garbage collection.
Installed JMX, Thread Dumps, and Wily Introscope for monitoring and performance analysis.
Developed automation scripts to streamline performance testing processes.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster for a high-throughput shopping engine.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing, reducing hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second latency.
Built CPPUNIT testing framework to automate conversion and ensure data integrity.
Designed scalable architectures to handle transaction volumes exceeding VISA’s throughput.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Conducted UML design and developed modules for a CICS/MQSeries/XML/DB2 system.
Focused on unit design for IRS modernization, ensuring robust system architecture.
Worked on messaging architecture using VC++ and DB2 for high-reliability systems.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ interfaces using POSIX, sockets, and Marconi APIs.
Optimized billing performance with C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL, achieving 75% memory reduction and 20% throughput increase.
Automated system administration for WebLogic/WebSphere environments using Korn Shell scripts.
Designed and implemented interfaces with UML in Rational Rose, incorporating design patterns.
Troubleshot and enhanced Enabler/CSM/EMS modules, improving operational efficiency.
Supported production environments with database queries and performance tuning, achieving 10x DB improvements.

flagship_projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
flagship_projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, and Grok (xAI). System orchestrates 10+ automated steps including semantic duplicate detection with FAISS vector embeddings, LLM-powered job scoring, resume/cover letter generation, and application tracking. Implemented multi-step agentic workflows with Claude Code and MCP server integration.
highlights: Designed and built 10-step agentic orchestration pipeline (intake → score → tailor → generate → render → quality gate → track)
Implemented semantic duplicate detection using FAISS vector embeddings and sentence-transformers
Integrated Grok-3 LLM API for job scoring, resume tailoring, and cover letter generation
Built quality gate with automated pattern detection to prevent bad output from reaching submission
Used Claude Code and MCP servers for AI-accelerated development throughout

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Replaced legacy manual forecasting with an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, and Streamlit. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90%. Built Prophet and scikit-learn models to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead. Created interactive Streamlit dashboards for real-time insights.
highlights: Replaced manual forecasting — cut cycles by 90%
Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead
Interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a full serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock. Built a Text-to-SQL GenAI agent with Claude 3 Sonnet. Resolved small file issues using Snappy and Parquet compression. Optimized ETL processes for enterprise-scale data access.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Conducted data mining of user performance metrics to optimize critical money-generating systems.
